jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Update project name and description to reflect the new branding and scope.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.human_impl:
<name>CamelTD :: ATM finder</name>
<description>Application to find ATM across The Netherlands</description>

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace individual Spring Framework dependencies with the Spring Boot Starter Web to simplify classpath management.
Remove explicit Log4j and SLF4J bindings, relying on Spring Boot's default logging configuration.
Remove Lombok dependency, likely in favor of Kotlin data classes or manual boilerplate.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency to support modern Spring Boot testing features.
Add Kotlin Standard Library dependency to support Kotlin source code compilation.
Replace legacy JUnit 4 and Mockito dependencies with Camel's JUnit 5 test support.
Add Camel Spring JUnit 5 test support for Spring-based Camel tests.
Add Kotest assertions for Kotlin-based testing.
Add MockK for Kotlin-native mocking in tests.
Add SpringMockK to integrate MockK with Spring testing.
Set the main source directory to Kotlin to enable Kotlin compilation.
Add and configure the Kotlin Maven Plugin to compile Kotlin source code with Spring and JPA plugins.
Configure Maven Jar Plugin to create a test-jar for sharing test utilities.
Update Java compiler source and target properties to use the new java.version property.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updates the Java source and target version properties from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrades Spring Boot parent to version 3.2.1 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Upgrades Apache Camel to version 4.3.0 which requires Java 17+ and aligns with Spring Boot 3.
Upgrades Spring Framework to version 6.0.4 to match Spring Boot 3 requirements.
Upgrades Spring Security to version 6.2.1 to align with Spring Framework 6.
Upgrades Jetty to version 11.0.19 to support Java 21 and Servlet 5/6 APIs.
Upgrades Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.12.0 to ensure proper compilation support for Java 21.
Upgrades Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.2.3 to support running tests on Java 21.
Upgrades Guava to 33.0.0-jre to ensure compatibility with newer JDKs and security patches.
Upgrades JUnit to 4.13.2 for bug fixes and maintenance.
Upgrades SLF4J Log4j12 binding to 1.7.36 for security and maintenance.
Upgrades JaCoCo Maven Plugin to 0.8.11 for better Java 21 coverage support.
Adds Kotlin standard library dependency to support Kotlin code in the project.
Adds Kotest assertions library for Kotlin-based testing.
Adds MockK library for Kotlin-based mocking in tests.
Adds SpringMockK library to integrate MockK with Spring testing.
Removes Lombok dependency as it is no longer used or replaced by other mechanisms.
Removes explicit Spring Web/WebMVC/Context dependencies in favor of Spring Boot BOM management.
Replaces coveralls-maven-plugin with omni-coveragereporter-maven-plugin for coverage reporting.
Removes redundant jdk.version property and aligns compiler source/target to use java.version directly.
Adds a descriptive name to the parent POM for better readability in Maven trees.
Upgrades Camel Test to 4.3.0 to match the main Camel version.
Upgrades Camel Spring to 3.14.10 to align with Camel 4.x ecosystem.
Upgrades Maven Resources Plugin to 3.3.1 for maintenance.
Upgrades Maven War Plugin to 3.4.0 for maintenance.
Upgrades Maven Jar Plugin to 3.3.0 for maintenance.
Upgrades Kotlin version to 1.9.22 for language feature support.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI Docker image from OpenJDK 17 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the target Java version.

.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the CI environment to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 to match the target runtime.
Bump GitHub Actions runners and setup-java actions to v3 for better maintenance and security.
Restrict the workflow trigger to only run on pushes to the master branch rather than all pushes.
Replace manual shell-based coverage reporting scripts with a unified Maven plugin (omni-coveragereporter) for cleaner CI steps.
Combine build, test, and JaCoCo agent preparation into a single Maven command for efficiency.
.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.human_impl: run: mvn clean install jacoco:prepare-agent package jacoco:report

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore HotSwapAgent attach files generated during development.
